hero.title: Custom Cakes & Cookies
hero.subTitle: for Every Celebration
hero.description: Beautifully crafted cakes, cookies, and desserts designed for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, graduations, corporate events, and life's most memorable moments.

featuredDesserts.title: Birthday Cookie Cake
featuredDesserts.description: Our oversized chocolate chip cookie cake topped with vanilla buttercream rosettes and rainbow sprinkles. Perfect for birthdays, celebrations, or just because.

signatureCakes.name: Strawberry Shortcake
signatureCakes.summary: Moist vanilla bean cake layered with fresh strawberries and vanilla buttercream.

signatureCakes.name: Campfire
signatureCakes.summary: A rich chocolate cake inspired by classic campfire s’mores flavors.

signatureCakes.name: Everything Biscoff
signatureCakes.summary: Chocolate cake packed with cookie butter flavor and Lotus cookie crunch.

signatureCakes.name: Cookies and Cream
signatureCakes.summary: A cookies-and-cream lover’s dream loaded with Oreos throughout.

signatureCakes.name: Lemon Dream
signatureCakes.summary: Bright citrus flavors balanced with silky lemon buttercream.

signatureCakes.name: Strawberries and Cream
signatureCakes.summary: Fresh strawberry cake paired with house-made strawberry reduction.
